data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and navy blues with selective amber and cyan accents. Maritime navigation scene: a digital chart table showing coastal waters, coordinate grid overlay, a tugboat silhouette, compass rose glowing amber. Radar sweep effect in corner. Professional maritime operations feel, modern bridge equipment aesthetic. Dark dramatic lighting, no text.
